items.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.author: kirushik
items.summary_zh: Claude Code被发现会在发出的请求中嵌入隐写术标记，这一做法引发了广泛讨论。这些标记以不易察觉的方式隐藏在正常数据流里，可能用于追溯请求来源、防止篡改或进行版权声明。虽然隐写本身并非恶意，但它意味着用户与AI交互时可能被无感追踪，从而引发隐私和透明度方面的担忧。对于注重数据隐蔽性和控制权的开发者来说，这无疑是个需要警惕的新动向。
items.summary_en: Claude Code has been discovered to embed steganographic marks within its outgoing requests, a technique that hides data in plain sight. These marks can trace the origin of requests, prevent tampering, or assert copyright. While not inherently malicious, the practice raises privacy and transparency concerns, as users may be unknowingly tracked during AI interactions. For developers who value data sovereignty and fine-grained control, this revelation signals a need to scrutinize how AI tools handle metadata beyond the obvious outputs.

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5
items.author: marinesebastian
items.summary_zh: Claude Sonnet 5是Anthropic最新发布的中等尺寸模型，旨在兼顾性能与成本效率。相比前代，它着重优化了上下文理解长度、指令遵循的准确性以及多轮对话中的一致性，同时在安全对齐方面做了进一步加固。对于需要高频调用AI但预算有限的团队来说，Sonnet 5是一个值得升级的选择。它在创意写作、商业分析和编程助手等任务中表现均衡，尤其适合那些希望在复杂场景中减少幻觉和偏差的严肃应用。
items.summary_en: Claude Sonnet 5 is Anthropic's latest mid-sized model, designed to balance performance with cost efficiency. It improves upon its predecessor in context window utilization, instruction following accuracy, and multi-turn conversation consistency, while reinforcing safety alignment. For teams that demand frequent AI calls on a budget, Sonnet 5 offers a worthwhile upgrade. It performs well in creative writing, business analysis, and coding assistance, making it a solid choice for serious applications that need reduced hallucination and bias without breaking the bank.

items.title: Qwen 3.6 27B is the sweet spot for local development
items.author: stared
items.summary_zh: Qwen 3.6 27B模型被社区誉为本地开发的“甜蜜点”，它在参数规模与性能消耗之间取得了巧妙平衡。27B的参数体量足以支撑复杂的代码生成、逻辑推理和自然语言理解，同时又能在消费级GPU上流畅运行，大大降低了个人开发者使用大模型的门槛。无论是用于本地IDE辅助编程，还是搭建私有AI助手，它都展现出不亚于云端大模型的实用价值，尤其适合对数据隐私和低延迟有严格要求的场景。
items.summary_en: The Qwen 3.6 27B model is hailed as the sweet spot for local development, striking an ideal balance between model capability and resource consumption. With 27 billion parameters, it handles complex code generation, reasoning, and language understanding, yet runs smoothly on consumer-grade GPUs, lowering the barrier for individual developers. It is especially valuable for offline IDE assistants or private AI agents where data privacy and low latency are paramount, providing near-cloud-level utility without the need for constant internet connectivity.

items.title: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
items.author: jms703
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2在最新的基准测试中击败了Claude，成为又一款引人注目的开源大模型。这个来自智谱AI的新版本在多项能力评估上展现了更强的推理和对话表现，尤其是在中文理解和复杂任务上优势明显。对于开源社区来说，这意味着除了Llama和Mistral之外，又多了一个能比肩顶级闭源模型的选择。开发者可以自由部署和微调，而性能的提升也让它更有潜力应用到实际产品中。
items.summary_en: GLM 5.2 has beaten Claude in recent benchmarks, emerging as another impressive open-source large language model. Developed by Zhipu AI, this new version demonstrates stronger reasoning and conversational abilities, particularly in Chinese understanding and complex tasks. For the open-source community, it represents a viable alternative to leading closed-source models like GPT-4 and Claude, joining the ranks of Llama and Mistral. The model's improved performance and open availability mean developers can freely deploy, fine-tune, and integrate it into real-world applications, leveling the playing field in AI capabilities.

items.title: Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Pragmata
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部刚刚解除了对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5这两款先进AI模型的出口管制。此前这些模型因可能被用于军事或监控而被限制出口，如今禁令取消意味着开发者可以更自由地将它们部署到海外市场。这对全球AI研发社区是个好消息，尤其是需要强大语言模型进行本地化应用或学术研究的团队。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, two advanced AI models that were previously restricted due to national security concerns. This change means developers and researchers around the world can now more freely deploy these models for tasks like natural language processing and creative content generation. The move is seen as a boost for global AI collaboration, particularly for startups and academic labs relying on cutting-edge language models without the burden of export licensing.

items.title: For first time, a cell built from scratch grows and divides
items.author: defrost
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次成功构建了一个完全人工设计的细胞，并且这个细胞能够自我生长和分裂。这个被称为“合成最小细胞”的项目用化学合成的DNA替换了天然基因组，证明我们可以在实验室里从头创造生命的基本功能。这项突破打开了一扇大门，未来或许能定制微生物来生产药物或分解塑料，但同时也引发了关于人造生命伦理的讨论。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have created a cell built entirely from scratch that can grow and divide on its own. This synthetic minimal cell, with a genome designed and chemically synthesized in the lab, demonstrates that the fundamental processes of life can be replicated from non-living components. The achievement has profound implications for biotechnology—think custom microbes that produce new medicines or clean up pollution. Yet it also raises ethical questions about playing God and the safety of self-replicating artificial organisms.

items.title: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation
items.author: Tiberium
items.summary_zh: 索尼宣布将从2028年1月起停止生产PlayStation新游戏的实体光盘。这意味着所有未来大作都只能以数字形式下载，实体收藏彻底成为历史。对玩家来说，这象征着一个时代的终结——我们再也感受不到拆开塑封、翻阅手册的仪式感；但另一方面，数字发行能减少物流成本和环境浪费，也方便随时随地下载。习惯二手交易或借光碟的玩家需要提前适应了。
items.summary_en: Sony has confirmed that production of physical discs for new PlayStation games will end in January 2028, marking the final sunset of the physical media era for console gaming. After that date, all new titles will be available only as digital downloads. This shift eliminates the tactile ritual of swapping discs, reading manuals, and collecting retail boxes, which many gamers cherish. On the flip side, it reduces manufacturing waste and enables instant access. For players who rely on secondhand markets or lending discs, the change forces a move toward a fully digital library.

items.title: Free the Icons
items.author: zdw
items.summary_zh: “Free the Icons”是一个旨在让图标摆脱版权束缚的社区运动。它呼吁设计师和平台释放其图标库的专有许可，让所有人都能免费使用、修改和分享图标，而无需担心侵权问题。该项目提供了一个包含数千枚高质量公共领域图标的开放库，特别适合网页开发者、移动应用设计师以及任何需要在项目中快速使用干净图标的人。它希望彻底消除图标使用中的法律灰色地带。
items.summary_en: Free the Icons is a grassroots initiative pushing to liberate icon sets from restrictive copyright licenses. It compiles a growing library of high-quality, public domain icons that anyone can use, modify, and redistribute without attribution or legal fears. The movement argues that icons, as basic visual building blocks of interfaces, should be as free as possible to encourage creativity and lower barriers for independent developers. By providing a clean, curated collection, Free the Icons aims to replace the messy patchwork of free-but-not-really icon sites, making life simpler for designers who just want a consistent visual language.

items.title: .self: A new top-level domain designed to support self-hosting
items.author: HumanCCF
items.summary_zh: .self是一个全新推出的顶级域名，专门为自托管爱好者设计。它允许个人或小团体直接在自己的服务器上运行网站、邮件服务器或云存储，而无需依赖大平台的域名解析服务。与传统的.com或.org不同，.self域名强调所有权和去中心化，让用户真正掌控自己的网络身份和数字基础设施。对于拒绝第三方监控、追求隐私和自主权的技术用户来说，这是一个值得关注的新选择。
items.summary_en: .self is a brand new top-level domain created specifically for the self-hosting community. It enables individuals and small groups to run their own websites, email servers, or cloud storage directly from their own hardware, with full control over DNS and data. Unlike traditional domains that lock users into centralized registrars, .self promotes complete digital sovereignty—no corporate snooping, no censorship, no dependency on big tech platforms. For privacy-conscious developers, hobbyists, and anyone tired of handing over their personal data to cloud giants, .self offers a novel way to assert ownership over one's online presence.

items.title: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas
items.author: backlit4034
items.summary_zh: 我们日常的争论，往往不是为了探寻真理，而是为了捍卫自我。这篇文章指出，当观点碰撞时，人们的第一反应常常是保护自己的面子或立场，而非理性地评估对方的论据。这种以自我为中心的争论方式不仅耗费精力，还会阻碍真正的沟通与进步。理解这一点，对于那些希望提升讨论质量、减少无效冲突的人来说至关重要。无论是职场会议还是网络辩论，意识到争论的本质是 ego 而非想法，才能让我们更专注于问题本身。
items.summary_en: Most online and offline arguments aren't really about ideas — they're about protecting egos. This piece argues that when people clash, their first instinct is to defend their self-image rather than evaluate the opponent's reasoning. This insight matters because recognizing the emotional undercurrent can help us de-escalate conflicts and focus on actual problem-solving. For anyone tired of circular debates on social media or in meetings, understanding that ego often drives disagreements is the first step toward more productive conversations.

items.title: Sony Deletes 551 Movies PlayStation Owners Paid For
items.author: bilsbie
items.summary_zh: 索尼近期删除了 PlayStation 用户已经购买的 551 部电影，引发了对数字内容所有权的强烈质疑。这些电影因许可证到期或内容下架而不再可用，尽管用户曾付费购买。这一事件再次提醒我们，在数字时代，“购买”并不意味着永久拥有，平台可以随时撤回访问权限。
items.summary_en: Sony has removed 551 movies from PlayStation owners who had previously purchased them, sparking outrage over digital ownership. The deletion was due to licensing expirations or content removals, leaving users with no way to access what they paid for. This incident underscores a critical flaw in the digital marketplace: buying a title does not guarantee lifetime access, as platforms can revoke permissions at any time. It serves as a cautionary tale for consumers and a call for clearer digital rights.

items.title: A new Android malware from Google
items.author: drewfax
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究员揭露了 Android 开发者验证流程中存在的严重安全隐患：这一本意是保护开发者账户的机制，反而可能被攻击者利用来冒充合法开发者。通过分析验证逻辑中的漏洞，攻击者可以绕过程序窃取身份或发布恶意应用。这相当于把保护门禁变成了入侵的梯子。对于 Android 生态中的所有开发者而言，这个问题值得高度警惕，因为它动摇了整个应用签名和身份信任体系的基础。
items.summary_en: A security researcher reveals that Android's Developer Verification process—designed to protect developers—can be exploited by attackers to impersonate legitimate developers. By analyzing flaws in the verification logic, adversaries can bypass protections, steal identities, or distribute malicious apps under trusted names. This turns a protective gate into an entry point for intrusion. The finding undermines the trust foundation of Android's app signing and identity system, making it a critical concern for every developer in the ecosystem.

items.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.author: msitarzewski
items.summary_zh: agency-agents是一个开源项目，提供了一套完整的AI代理团队，包括前端专家、社交媒体运营、创意注入者等各种角色。开发者可以通过简单的配置快速组建自己的AI“工作室”，无需从头训练每个模型。对于需要快速验证产品想法或自动化内容创作的个人和小团队来说，这个项目大大降低了AI应用的门槛，让每个人都能拥有一个虚拟的创业团队。
items.summary_en: Agency-agents is an open-source project that bundles a complete set of AI agents emulating a full-fledged digital agency. It includes roles like frontend wizards, Reddit community managers, and whimsy injectors, allowing developers to assemble a tailored AI team with minimal configuration. The beauty lies in its plug-and-play nature — you don't need to train each agent from scratch. For indie hackers, startup founders, and content creators, this means rapidly prototyping products or automating online presence without hiring a real team. It's a glimpse into a future where AI collaborates in structured, specialized groups.

items.summary_en: Microsoft's AI for Beginners is a free, structured curriculum that spans 12 weeks with 24 lessons, covering essential AI topics like machine learning, neural networks, and computer vision. This repo makes AI education accessible to everyone, from students to career changers, providing a solid foundation without needing prior experience. It's a perfect starting point for anyone curious about artificial intelligence.

items.summary_en: Apple has open-sourced container, a tool that creates and manages Linux containers on Mac using lightweight virtual machines. items.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
items.author: calesthio
items.summary_zh: OpenMontage 是首个开源智能体视频制作系统，拥有 12 条流水线、52 个工具和 500 多种智能体技能，可以把你的 AI 编程助手变成一个完整的视频制作团队。它解决了传统视频制作流程复杂、门槛高的问题，通过智能体自动完成脚本、剪辑、配音、特效等任务，让任何人都能快速生成专业视频。对内容创作者、营销人员和开发者来说，这意味着不需要专业设备或团队，只用自然语言描述就能产出高质量视频，极大降低了视频制作的门槛和成本。
items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.summary_en: mvanhorn/last30days-skill is an AI agent capability that automatically researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the broader web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. It tackles information fragmentation, making it invaluable for researchers, content creators, and investors who need a quick, reliable overview of recent discourse and sentiment around a topic.

items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.

items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

items.summary_zh: Supervision是Roboflow推出的开源计算机视觉工具库，旨在简化视觉AI应用的开发流程。它提供数据标注、模型评估、可视化等可复用组件，支持主流框架如YOLO、SAM等。开发者无需重复造轮子，即可快速搭建从训练到部署的完整管线，适合计算机视觉工程师和研究人员提高效率。
items.summary_en: Supervision is an open source library from Roboflow that provides reusable computer vision tools for building and deploying vision AI applications. It offers components for data annotation, model evaluation, visualization, and integration with popular frameworks like YOLO and SAM. The project solves the problem of reinventing common CV workflows, allowing developers to quickly assemble pipelines from training to production. It's a time saver for computer vision engineers and researchers who want to focus on their specific models rather than boilerplate code.

items.title: Acti
items.description: Agentic keyboard for mobile commands and search
items.summary_zh: Acti 是一款新型的智能键盘应用，旨在将手机变为一个强大的命令中心。不同于传统键盘仅用于文字输入，Acti 集成了 agentic AI，可以直接通过键盘执行搜索、发送消息或调用应用程序等功能。对于频繁在手机上切换操作的用户来说，它省去了反复打开不同应用的麻烦。这款产品的亮点在于将 AI 助手直接嵌入打字界面，让命令执行变得像输入文字一样自然流畅。移动办公或日常使用都会因此变得更加高效。
items.summary_en: Acti reimagines the mobile keyboard as an agentic command center. Instead of just typing text, users can perform searches, send messages, or trigger app actions directly from the keyboard. This eliminates the need to constantly switch between apps for simple tasks. For power users who rely on their phone for work and productivity, Acti turns a mundane input method into a seamless command interface. The clever integration of AI means you can just type what you need, and the keyboard handles the rest. It's a practical upgrade for anyone looking to streamline mobile workflows.

items.title: Humalike
items.description: Give your AI agents the social intelligence they're missing
items.summary_zh: Humalike 致力于为 AI 代理赋予社交智能，让它们不再只是冰冷的对话机器。很多 AI 能够回答问题，但缺乏对人类社交规则的理解，比如何时保持沉默、如何委婉表达、或识别讽刺。Humalike 通过专门的社交能力模型，教会 AI 感知对话中的情绪和语境，从而做出更得体的回应。这对于客服、虚拟助手或社交机器人等场景尤为重要，能够显著提升用户体验，避免尴尬或冒犯。当 AI 学会读空气，人机交互才能真正走向自然。
items.summary_en: Humalike tackles a blind spot in current AI agents: social intelligence. Most bots can answer questions but fail at nuanced human interactions — knowing when to pause, how to soften a rejection, or catching sarcasm. By training models specifically on social cues and emotional context, Humalike helps agents respond more appropriately. This is a game-changer for customer service, virtual assistants, and social robots, where a clumsy reply can ruin the experience. For developers building conversational AI, integrating social skills means their agents won't just be smart — they'll be likable and trustworthy.

items.title: Tabstack Browser Automation
items.description: Automate the web in your app or agent, no browser to host
items.summary_zh: Tabstack 提供了一种全新的浏览器自动化方案，无需自托管浏览器即可在应用或 AI 代理中操控网页。传统上，自动化需要搭建独立的浏览器环境，复杂且资源消耗大。Tabstack 将这项能力封装为轻量级 API，开发者可以直接集成到自己的软件中，让 AI 代理像人一样打开标签页、填写表单并抓取数据。对于需要实时网页交互的自动化任务，比如数据采集、测试或 AI 工作流，Tabstack 大大降低了门槛，避免了维护浏览器的繁琐。
items.summary_en: Tabstack Browser Automation changes how developers integrate web automation into apps and AI agents. Instead of spinning up a dedicated browser instance, Tabstack offers a lightweight API that handles tab management, form filling, and data extraction. This removes the overhead of hosting and maintaining a browser environment. For builders who want their AI to interact with live websites — like scraping dynamic content or automating workflows — Tabstack is a huge simplification. It's particularly useful for agent-driven tasks where you need reliable, browser-free web access without the usual infrastructure headache.

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5
items.description: AI that plans, acts, and gets work done
items.summary_zh: Claude Sonnet 5 是 Anthropic 推出的新一代 AI 模型，强调从对话走向行动。不同于以往只生成文本的模型，Sonnet 5 被设计为能够自主规划任务、执行多步操作并最终交付成果。它不仅能理解复杂指令，还能调用工具、编写代码或管理文件，像一个真正的数字员工。这对于需要自动化复杂工作流的知识工作者来说意义重大，因为 AI 不再只是建议者，而是实际的执行者。随着 AI 从聊天走向实干，Sonnet 5 代表了生产力工具的一次重要进化。
items.summary_en: Claude Sonnet 5 marks a shift from conversational AI to action-oriented agents. Unlike previous models that only generate text, Sonnet 5 can plan multi-step tasks, use tools, write code, and manage files to deliver actual results. It's designed to function like a digital employee that understands instructions and follows through. This matters for knowledge workers and developers who need a reliable assistant for complex workflows — it's not just about answering questions anymore, but about getting work done. With Sonnet 5, Anthropic positions AI as a doer, not just a talker, which could redefine how we think about productivity software.

items.title: Adam CAD Copilot
items.description: AI CAD inside Onshape and Fusion
items.summary_zh: Adam CAD Copilot 是一款内置于 Onshape 和 Fusion 的 AI 设计助手，能够通过自然语言指令辅助工程师快速创建和修改三维模型。它不仅降低了专业 CAD 软件的使用门槛，还能显著提升设计效率，特别适合需要频繁迭代的工业设计和机械工程团队。
items.summary_en: Adam CAD Copilot is an AI-powered tool integrated directly into Onshape and Fusion, enabling engineers to generate and modify 3D models through natural language commands. By lowering the barrier to professional CAD software and speeding up design iterations, it benefits industrial design and mechanical engineering teams looking to boost productivity and streamline workflows.

items.title: Cursor for iOS
items.description: Build with coding agents from anywhere
items.summary_zh: Cursor推出了iOS版本，让你能在手机上使用编码代理进行开发。这意味着你可以随时随地写代码、调试甚至部署，不再局限于桌面电脑。它内置了AI驱动的代码补全和智能助手，能够理解上下文帮你完成重复性任务。对于经常在路上的程序员、自由职业者或者想利用碎片时间学习编程的人来说，这是一个改变游戏规则的工具，把专业开发环境装进了口袋里。
items.summary_en: Cursor has released an iOS app that brings its AI-powered coding agents to your phone, allowing you to write, debug, and even deploy code from anywhere. The app features intelligent code completion and a context-aware assistant that helps you handle repetitive tasks. For programmers who are always on the go, freelancers juggling multiple projects, or anyone wanting to code during commutes, this turns your iPhone into a portable development environment. It's a game-changer for mobile productivity, though heavy lifting might still require a desktop.

items.title: Skills Marketplace by Databox
items.description: Ready-made AI analytics skills for your business data
items.summary_zh: Databox推出了Skills Marketplace，这是一个预配置AI分析技能的集合，可以直接应用到你的商业数据上。你不再需要从头构建模型或编写复杂公式，只需选择适合的“技能”比如销售预测、客户分群或异常检测，即可快速获得洞察。对于中小企业和非技术营销人员来说，这大大降低了数据分析的门槛。想象一下，只需点击几下就能自动分析网站流量趋势或财务指标，确实很实用。
items.summary_en: Databox's Skills Marketplace offers a library of pre-built AI analytics skills that plug directly into your business data. Instead of building custom models or writing SQL queries, you can pick ready-made skills like sales forecasting, customer segmentation, or anomaly detection. This lowers the barrier for SMEs and non-technical marketers to gain actionable insights without data science expertise. With just a few clicks, you can automate complex analyses of web traffic, financial metrics, or operational KPIs. It's practical, time-saving, and brings enterprise-grade analytics to smaller teams.

items.title: Foresight by Lightning Rod
items.description: Predict anything with AI
items.summary_zh: Lightning Rod推出的Foresight是一个AI预测工具，声称能对几乎任何事情做出预测，从市场趋势到个人决策。它利用机器学习分析历史数据和实时信息，输出概率和建议。比如你可以用它预测产品发布日期对销量的影响，或者评估投资风险。对于创业者、产品经理和数据分析师来说，这个工具把未来可能性变得可视化和可量化。不过，预测的准确性取决于输入数据的质量，仍然需要人类的判断力来解读结果。
items.summary_en: Foresight by Lightning Rod is an AI tool that promises to predict just about anything, from market trends to personal decisions. It uses machine learning to analyze historical data and real-time inputs, outputting probabilities and recommendations. For example, you could forecast how a product launch date will affect sales or assess investment risks. Entrepreneurs, product managers, and data analysts will find it useful for making better-informed decisions by quantifying uncertainties. However, the tool's accuracy hinges on data quality, and human judgment is still needed to interpret its outputs.

items.title: Akiflow
items.description: Manage tasks and calendars from Claude, ChatGPT or Cursor

items.title: Supafax
items.description: Email-native assistant that learns how you work

items.title: Agent Mode by Receiptor AI
items.description: Bookkeeping assistant that runs receipt workflows end-to-end
items.summary_zh: Receiptor AI推出的Agent Mode是一个端到端的记账助手，能够自动处理从收据扫描、分类到对账的整个工作流程。相比于传统手动录入或半自动工具，它利用AI理解收据上下文并完成复杂操作，大幅节省财务人员和小企业主的时间，减少出错率。
items.summary_en: Agent Mode by Receiptor AI is an end-to-end bookkeeping assistant that automates receipt workflows from scanning and categorization to reconciliation. Instead of manual data entry or basic OCR, it uses AI to understand receipt context and execute complex tasks like matching expenses to accounts. This saves significant time for freelancers and small business owners, reducing errors and freeing them from tedious financial admin, making bookkeeping nearly effortless.

items.title: Spira for Product Hunt Makers
items.description: Social media growth agents that build your momentum
items.summary_zh: Spira是一款专为Product Hunt开发者设计的社交媒体增长代理工具，它通过自动化策略帮助产品获得初始 momentum，例如发帖互动、评论和分享。对于刚刚上线产品、急需曝光但缺乏营销时间的创业者来说，Spira能够节省精力并快速积累早期用户反馈，把精力放回产品本身。
items.summary_en: Spira is a social media growth agent tailored for Product Hunt makers, automating interactions like posting, commenting, and sharing to build early momentum for new launches. For founders who lack time for manual promotion, Spira helps gain visibility and gather initial user feedback quickly. It's essentially a digital assistant that handles the social grind, allowing creators to focus on improving their product rather than chasing likes and comments.

items.title: ClinePass
items.description: Run the best open-weights models in Cline
items.summary_zh: ClinePass是一个让开发者能在Cline环境中直接运行最佳开源权重模型的工具，无需复杂配置或迁移代码。它解决了模型部署过程中的兼容性和性能瓶颈，尤其适合AI研究者与工程师快速测试不同模型，加速实验与集成流程，降低了使用开源模型的门槛。
items.summary_en: ClinePass enables developers to run the best open-weights models directly within the Cline environment without complex setup or code migration. It solves compatibility and performance issues commonly faced when deploying open-source models, making it ideal for AI researchers and engineers who need to quickly test different models. By streamlining the workflow, ClinePass reduces friction and speeds up experimentation, lowering the barrier to leveraging cutting-edge open models in real projects.

items.title: VisibAI
items.description: Are you in AI answers? Find out and fix it in minutes

items.title: PMB
items.description: Stop re-explaining your project to AI coding agents

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: Codex 穷鬼大救星
items.description: 穷则思变，富则...算了，富哥就不用看这篇文章了！ 为了守护我们钱包，这套穷鬼工作流横空出世！ 欢迎来到 AI 黑心包工队！
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套名为“穷鬼工作流”的AI编程方案，旨在帮助预算有限的开发者利用Codex等工具低成本完成项目。作者以幽默自嘲的口吻，将这套方案比作“AI黑心包工队”，强调其核心价值是让手头拮据的程序员也能享受AI带来的效率提升，而不必购买昂贵的付费服务。对于个人开发者和小团队尤其实用。
items.summary_en: This article introduces a budget-friendly AI coding workflow called "Poor Guy Workflow," aimed at helping developers with limited funds leverage tools like Codex to complete projects at low cost. The author humorously dubs it an "AI shady contractor team," emphasizing that it allows coders on a tight budget to enjoy AI efficiency boosts without expensive subscriptions. It's especially practical for indie developers and small teams.

items.title: 阿里一面，我霸气反问：你说你们在做Agent项目，说说langchain、muti-agent、a2a这些你们都是怎么做的？面试官一直在擦汗。。
items.description: 阿里一面Agent方向面试复盘，涵盖LangChain架构、Multi-Agent、A2A协议、MCP、Transformer自注意力、大模型对比等核心面试题
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇阿里Agent方向的面试复盘，作者详细讲述了面试中关于LangChain架构、多智能体协作、A2A协议、MCP（多智能体协调协议）以及Transformer自注意力等核心问题的问答。作者以反问方式展现了扎实的技术深度，不仅供准备面试的开发者参考，也为关注当前AI Agent开发技术栈的从业者提供了第一手经验。
items.summary_en: This article shares a real interview experience for a position focused on AI Agents at Alibaba. The interviewer posed challenging questions covering LangChain architecture, multi-agent collaboration, the A2A protocol, MCP, and Transformer self-attention mechanisms. The candidate's bold counter-questions highlighted deep technical understanding. This piece serves as an excellent resource for developers preparing for similar roles or anyone wanting to grasp the current state of AI Agent engineering, including practical insights into how these technologies interplay in real-world systems.

items.title: 面试官：“你连Claude Code都没用过吗？”，我怼回去：“就没用过又怎么了？”
items.description: 现在提起AI编程工具，Claude Code绝对是大家心目中的首选。甚至在面试当中，一句“你有没有用过Claude Code？”，已然成为衡量你技术敏感度的‘试金石’。！今天给大家分享下它的实战玩法！
items.summary_zh: 文章以面试中被问及Claude Code使用经历的场景为引子，作者起初对面试官的质疑表示不满，但随后分享了自己实际使用Claude Code的实战玩法。文中详细介绍了Claude Code在代码生成、调试和重构中的高效表现，强调了掌握AI编程工具正在成为技术敏感度的新标尺。对于求职者和开发者而言，这不仅是工具推荐，更是职业发展的提醒。
items.summary_en: The article starts with a job interview where the candidate is asked about Claude Code experience, initially feeling defensive. But then the author shares practical tips on using Claude Code for code generation, debugging, and refactoring, highlighting how proficiency in AI coding tools is becoming a benchmark for technical savvy. For job seekers and developers, it's not just a tool recommendation but a wake-up call for career growth.

items.title: Vibe Coding 时代：Vue 消失了还是 React 太强？
items.description: Vibe Coding 时代：Vue 消失了还是 React 太强？ 作者：吴佳浩 撰稿时间：2026-3-28 最后更新：2026-3-30 引言： 最近一段时间，“vibe coding” 的项目
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了在Vibe Coding（基于AI情绪化编码）时代，Vue和React两大前端框架的地位变化。作者分析了为何有人认为Vue逐渐式微而React愈发强势，并指出AI编程工具可能更倾向于与React生态兼容。文章引发读者思考：在AI辅助编码日益普及的今天，前端开发者应如何选择技术栈，以及Vue是否真的面临生存危机。
items.summary_en: This article explores the shifting status of Vue and React in the era of Vibe Coding, where AI-assisted development is driven by mood and flow. The author analyzes why some believe Vue is fading while React grows stronger, noting that AI coding tools may favor React's ecosystem. It prompts readers to think about how frontend developers should choose their stack and whether Vue truly faces an existential threat as AI-assisted coding becomes mainstream.

items.title: DeepSeek正式官宣摇人，夯！
items.description: 话说 DeepSeek 这次真的是破天荒了。 自 2023 年正式创立以来，三年了，你啥时候见过这个公司专门大张旗鼓发公告招过人。 但是就在前几天，DeepSeek 直接丢出王炸，正式官宣大规模摇人，
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek自2023年创立以来首次正式发布大规模招聘公告，打破了此前低调、不主动招人的传统。这一动作表明DeepSeek正在加速扩张，可能为应对更激烈的AI竞争和业务增长做准备。对求职者而言，进入这家以技术见长的初创公司意味着参与前沿大模型研发的机会。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, the AI startup founded in 2023, has for the first time publicly announced a large-scale recruitment drive, marking a significant shift from its previous low-key hiring approach. This move signals rapid expansion, likely to fuel growth and compete in the increasingly crowded AI landscape. For job seekers, it represents a rare opportunity to join a company known for its strong technical focus and work on cutting-edge large language models, making it a notable event in the Chinese AI talent market.

items.title: 为什么越来越多的人使用FastAPI?
items.description: 前言 最近这几年，Python在AI和数据处理领域如日中天，很多Java开发者也开始接触Python生态。 在Python的众多Web框架中，FastAPI的崛起速度让人瞠目结舌。 GitHub上，F
items.summary_zh: FastAPI作为Python异步Web框架，凭借其高并发性能、自动生成API文档和类型安全等特性，正在吸引越来越多的开发者。它特别适合AI和数据处理领域，能够快速构建微服务和API，与Pydantic等库无缝集成，解决了传统框架开发效率低、文档维护难的问题。无论是初创项目还是大型系统，FastAPI都能让开发更高效、更可靠。
items.summary_en: FastAPI is rapidly gaining popularity among Python developers due to its high performance, automatic API documentation generation, and type safety. It solves the problem of building modern web APIs quickly and efficiently, especially in AI and data processing contexts where speed and correctness matter. The framework leverages asynchronous programming and integrates seamlessly with Pydantic for data validation, making it a top choice for microservices and RESTful APIs. Developers benefit from reduced boilerplate code and fewer runtime errors.

items.title: 《置身钉内》之后：普通前端的出路在哪里？
items.description: 最近钉钉员工 7.5 万字离职长文引发热议，真正刺痛很多人的，可能不只是某个团队的管理问题，而是大家都在同一种职场气候里闻到了熟悉的味道： 项目很急，方向常变； 汇报很多，确认很少； 每个人都在努力，
items.summary_zh: 这篇讨论源于钉钉员工一篇7.5万字的离职长文，文中描述的职场困境——项目急、方向变、汇报多、确认少——引发了许多前端从业者的共鸣。文章反思了普通前端在行业不确定性中的出路，指出单纯依靠框架技能已不够，需要培养业务理解、工程化思维和AI工具运用能力，才能避免被边缘化。
items.summary_en: This piece stems from a 75,000-word resignation letter by a DingTalk employee, which described common workplace struggles—urgent projects, shifting directions, excessive reporting, and little confirmation—that resonated with many frontend developers. The article reflects on how ordinary frontend engineers can find their way amid industry uncertainty, arguing that relying solely on framework skills is no longer enough. It advocates for business understanding, engineering thinking, and mastery of AI tools to avoid being marginalized.

items.title: DeepSeek这次招得太猛了，36个岗位，80%都要会Agent！
items.description: 从 DeepSeek 最新 36 个在招岗位的 JD 拆解 AI 时代的人才需求变化，逐岗位分析服务端、前端/客户端、测试开发的能力进化方向，附转型准备指南。DeepSeek 开始摇人了，有点猛啊。
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了DeepSeek最新发布的36个招聘岗位，发现其中80%的职位明确要求具备Agent（智能体）相关能力。作者逐岗位拆解了服务端、前端/客户端、测试开发等方向的能力需求变化，指出AI时代的人才标准正在从传统编码转向Agent开发与集成。文章同时提供了转型准备指南，帮助开发者提前布局，适应这一趋势。
items.summary_en: This article analyzes DeepSeek's latest 36 job openings, revealing that 80% explicitly require Agent-related capabilities. The author breaks down the evolving skill requirements across backend, frontend/client-side, and test development roles, arguing that the talent standard in the AI era is shifting from traditional coding to Agent development and integration. It also provides a preparation guide for developers to pivot and stay ahead of the trend.

items.title: 机器人伴侣价格 11.98 万至 99 万，不同价格之间有啥区别？定价合理吗？你看好它的市场前景吗？
items.summary_zh: 机器人伴侣产品价格跨度从11.98万到99万元，差异主要来自外观逼真度、交互能力、AI情感模型以及定制化程度。有观点认为定价偏高，但分析指出技术成本、研发投入和市场定位决定了高价。市场前景存在争议：一方看好情感陪伴刚需，另一方担忧伦理问题和实际体验成熟度。这场讨论折射出人机关系新时代的机遇与挑战。
items.summary_en: Robot companion prices range from 119,800 to 990,000 yuan, with variations in appearance realism, interaction capabilities, AI emotional models, and customization. The pricing raised questions about affordability and market viability. While some see potential in addressing emotional companionship needs, others expressed concerns over ethics and technological maturity. The discussion reflects a broader debate on human-robot relationships, highlighting both the promise of advanced AI companions and the hurdles of cost, privacy, and social acceptance.

items.title: 因印度供应商遭网络攻击，iPhone18 Pro Max 银灰色曝光，有哪些亮点？此泄露暴露出哪些问题？
items.summary_zh: 印度供应商遭网络攻击导致iPhone 18 Pro Max银灰色机型设计信息提前曝光，包括可能的新颜色和外观细节。此事件暴露出全球供应链中安全管理的重大漏洞，尤其对海外供应商的网络安全监管不足。苹果等科技巨头需要加强零信任架构、供应链安全审计和应急响应机制，防止类似泄露影响产品发布节奏和商业机密。
items.summary_en: A cyberattack on an Indian supplier leaked design details of the iPhone 18 Pro Max in a new silver gray color. This breach highlights critical supply chain security vulnerabilities, especially when relying on overseas partners. The incident underscores the need for stricter cybersecurity measures, zero-trust architectures, and regular security audits across the entire supply chain. For tech giants like Apple, such leaks can disrupt product launch timelines and expose trade secrets, reinforcing the importance of proactive defense and supplier vetting.

items.title: Meta 拟对外出售剩余 AI 算力，引发美股芯片及光通信重挫，对此你怎么看，会是 AI 退潮信号么？
items.summary_zh: Meta计划出售闲置AI算力资源，导致美股芯片和光通信板块大幅下跌。市场担忧此举可能预示AI算力需求放缓，从而影响英伟达、博通等供应商业绩。但也有分析师认为Meta只是优化资产配置、降低运营成本，并非AI浪潮退潮信号。短期市场情绪受冲击，长期需观察其他科技巨头的算力投资动向。
items.summary_en: Meta's plan to sell excess AI computing capacity sparked a selloff in semiconductor and optical communication stocks. Investors worry this signals a slowdown in AI infrastructure demand, potentially hurting suppliers like Nvidia and Broadcom. However, some analysts view it as asset optimization rather than a harbinger of AI cooling. The market reaction reflects heightened sensitivity around AI spending and capacity utilization. Whether this is a temporary correction or a trend shift depends on how other tech giants manage their computing resources in the coming quarters.

items.title: 曝微软将再裁 5000 人，一年累计裁员数逼近 2 万人，发生了什么？裁员数量激增释放了哪些信号？
items.summary_zh: 微软被曝将再裁5000人，使得一年累计裁员逼近2万。这反映出科技行业增长放缓、成本压力增大以及公司战略调整，微软从疫情扩张转向AI和效率优先。对从业者和投资者而言，这是一个科技巨头用人策略根本转变的信号。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is reportedly cutting another 5,000 jobs, pushing its total layoffs over the past year to nearly 20,000. This ongoing reduction reflects the tech industry's growth slowdown, rising cost pressures, and Microsoft's strategic shift from pandemic-era expansion to focusing on AI and operational efficiency. It signals a fundamental change in how big tech manages its workforce, impacting employees, investors, and industry observers.

items.title: 203.8亿，AI视频最大单笔融资，即将诞生
items.summary_zh: AI视频领域即将诞生一笔高达203.8亿元的巨额融资，这将是该赛道史上最大单笔融资，标志着资本对AI视频生成技术前景的强烈信心，也预示着行业竞争将进一步白热化。
items.summary_en: A record-breaking single funding round of 20.38 billion yuan is about to close in the AI video sector, making it the largest such deal ever. This highlights the strong investor confidence in AI video generation technology and signals an increasingly fierce competition in the industry.

items.title: 独家｜清华系初创完成数亿元种子轮融资：我们不想被贴上「世界模型」的标签
items.summary_zh: 一家源自清华大学的初创公司完成了数亿元种子轮融资，团队明确表示不愿被简单归类为“世界模型”，他们致力于探索更独特的技术路径，而非随大流，这种定位吸引了业界关注。
items.summary_en: A Tsinghua-affiliated startup has secured hundreds of millions of yuan in seed funding, but its founders stress they are not building a "world model". They aim to differentiate themselves in the AI space with a distinct technical approach, avoiding mainstream hype, which has drawn significant industry attention.

items.title: Karpathy又封神，掀翻RAG，把你的笔记变成第二大脑
items.summary_zh: 著名AI学者Karpathy再次引发轰动，他提出了一种颠覆传统RAG的新方法，能将用户个人笔记转化为真正的“第二大脑”，实现更智能的知识管理与回想，极大提升了个人笔记的利用效率。
items.summary_en: AI luminary Andrej Karpathy has stunned the community with a new approach that overturns traditional RAG systems. By transforming users' personal notes into a "second brain", it offers a smarter way to manage and recall knowledge, dramatically improving the utility of personal notes.

items.title: 苹果供应链最严重的一次泄露，泄的不是新 iPhone 长什么样
items.summary_zh: 苹果供应链遭遇了有史以来最严重的泄密事件，但令人意外的是，泄露的内容并非下一代iPhone的外观设计，而是更为核心的供应链数据和内部运作细节，这将对苹果造成更大的潜在风险。
items.summary_en: Apple's supply chain has suffered its worst leak ever, yet the exposed information is not about the next iPhone's design. Instead, it reveals sensitive supply chain data and internal operations, posing a more serious threat to the company than typical product leaks.

items.title: Anthropic承认了，Claude Code木马门被抓包，明天回滚
items.summary_zh: Anthropic近期承认其AI编程工具Claude Code存在安全隐患，被社区发现类似木马的行为，公司宣布将于明天进行回滚修复，此事引发了开发者对AI工具安全性的广泛讨论与警惕。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has admitted that its AI coding tool Claude Code had a security issue resembling a Trojan, detected by the community. The company plans to roll back the update tomorrow, sparking debates on the safety of AI development tools and raising awareness among developers.

items.title: 80后夫妻做半导体设备，要IPO了，拟募资11.9亿
items.summary_zh: 一对80后夫妻创办的半导体设备公司即将IPO，计划募资11.9亿元。该公司专注于半导体制造关键设备的自主研发与生产，其上市不仅体现了创业者在中国芯片国产化浪潮中的成功，更对半导体产业链的自主可控具有重要示范意义，将激励更多技术型夫妻档投身硬科技创业。
items.summary_en: A semiconductor equipment company founded by a post-80s couple is heading for an IPO, aiming to raise 1.19 billion yuan. The firm focuses on developing and producing critical semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Its listing underscores the success of entrepreneurs in China's push for chip self-sufficiency and serves as a milestone for the country's semiconductor supply chain independence, inspiring more tech-savvy couples to dive into hard-tech ventures.

让Agent越用越强：AReaL 2.0开源，给智能体装上“成长系统”
items.summary_zh: AReaL 2.0 近期开源，这是一个专门为智能体打造的“成长系统”，核心在于赋予 AI Agent 持续学习和自我进化的能力。与传统的静态模型不同，该系统允许智能体在实际使用中不断吸收新知识、优化决策策略，从而越用越聪明、越用越适应复杂场景。对于开发者而言，这意味着他们可以构建出真正具备长期生命力的 Agent 应用，而不是一次训练后就停滞不前的工具。这一项目开源后，将极大降低让智能体具备持续学习能力的技术门槛，推动 AI 从“一次性交付”走向“持续进化”。
items.summary_en: AReaL 2.0 has been open-sourced, introducing a growth system that enables AI agents to learn and evolve continuously during use. Unlike static models, this system allows agents to absorb new knowledge and refine decision-making strategies over time, becoming smarter and more adaptive in complex scenarios. For developers, it opens the door to building agents with long-term vitality rather than one-shot tools. By lowering the barrier to continuous learning in AI, AReaL 2.0 pushes the industry toward agents that truly improve with every interaction.

items.title: Vercel 推出开源 AI 智能体开发框架 Eve
items.summary_zh: Vercel正式发布了名为Eve的开源AI智能体开发框架，旨在降低AI智能体应用的构建和部署门槛。Eve提供了一系列模块化的工具和强大的运行时支持，开发者可以像搭积木一样快速创建、测试和扩展自己的智能体。这一框架特别适合前端开发者、全栈工程师以及希望将AI能力集成到Web应用中的团队，它让智能体开发变得简单而高效，有望加速AI在Web领域的落地。
items.summary_en: Vercel has officially released Eve, an open-source framework for building AI agents, designed to lower the barrier to creating and deploying agent applications. Eve provides a set of modular tools and robust runtime support, allowing developers to quickly build, test, and scale their agents like assembling building blocks. This framework is particularly suited for frontend developers, full-stack engineers, and teams looking to integrate AI capabilities into web applications, making agent development simple and efficient and potentially accelerating the adoption of AI in the web domain.

items.title: 代码是写给未来的讯息
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章深刻反思了编程的本质：代码不仅是给机器运行的指令，更是写给未来开发者（包括未来的自己）的一封信。作者认为，优秀的代码应当像一篇流畅的记叙文，注重可读性、意图表达和长期可维护性，而非仅仅追求当下的功能实现。在技术快速迭代的今天，这种“为未来写代码”的理念尤为重要，它提醒我们在追求效率的同时，不要忘记团队协作和知识传承的价值。
items.summary_en: This article reflects on the essence of programming: code is not just instructions for machines but a message to future developers—including your future self. The author argues that great code should read like a clear narrative, prioritizing readability, intent, and long-term maintainability over mere functional correctness. In an era of rapid tech iteration, this philosophy becomes crucial, reminding us to balance speed with collaboration and knowledge transfer. It's a call to write code that future humans will thank you for.

items.title: 当设计师和PM都开始写代码，产品构建方式又要变天了？
items.summary_zh: 随着低代码工具和AI辅助编程的快速发展，越来越多的设计师和产品经理开始亲自编写代码，这一趋势正在从根本上改变产品的构建方式。文章深入探讨了这种变化对团队协作模式、角色定义以及开发流程带来的深远影响。对于产品团队、设计团队和技术管理者来说，理解并适应这一转变至关重要，它可能重新定义谁负责构建产品，以及如何更高效地交付创新。
items.summary_en: With the rapid evolution of low-code tools and AI-assisted programming, more and more designers and product managers are starting to write code themselves, a trend that is fundamentally changing how products are built. The article delves into the profound impact of this shift on team collaboration models, role definitions, and development workflows. For product teams, design teams, and technical managers, understanding and adapting to this transformation is crucial, as it may redefine who is responsible for building products and how innovation can be delivered more efficiently.

items.title: Cloudflare CEO 警告：未来两年，Agent 会让互联网每周爆出一个 Log4j
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare CEO发出严厉警告，认为随着AI Agent的快速普及，未来两年内互联网可能每周都会爆出一个类似Log4j级别的严重安全漏洞。他指出Agent的自动化和大规模部署开辟了全新的攻击面，让现有防护体系面临巨大压力，安全团队必须立刻行动。这一预警对所有网络安全从业者、企业IT管理者以及依赖互联网服务的普通用户都具有极高的警示意义，提醒我们Agent时代的安全挑战远比想象的更加严峻。
items.summary_en: The Cloudflare CEO has issued a stark warning that as AI agents become widespread, the internet could face a Log4j-level vulnerability every week within the next two years. He explains that the automation and large-scale deployment of agents introduce entirely new attack surfaces, putting immense pressure on existing security defenses and requiring immediate action from security teams. This warning carries critical implications for cybersecurity professionals, enterprise IT managers, and everyday internet users, underscoring that the security challenges of the agent era are far more severe than previously imagined.

items.title: Dapr 1.18 推出可验证执行功能，为 AI 智能体与工作流赋予密码学信任能力
items.summary_zh: Dapr 1.18版本推出了可验证执行这一重要功能，为AI智能体和工作流注入了密码学级别的信任能力。通过该功能，用户可以严格验证代码是否按预期执行，确保整个执行过程不可篡改且可审计。这对于构建分布式系统、微服务以及复杂AI工作流的开发者来说意义重大，解决了长期存在的信任和合规难题。尤其在高安全要求的企业环境中，这一特性让自动化流程更加可靠和透明。
items.summary_en: Dapr 1.18 introduces a significant feature called verifiable execution, which brings cryptographic-level trust to AI agents and workflows. With this capability, users can rigorously verify that code executes exactly as intended, ensuring the entire execution process is tamper-proof and auditable. This is a major breakthrough for developers building distributed systems, microservices, and complex AI workflows, solving long-standing trust and compliance challenges. Particularly in enterprise environments with high security requirements, this feature makes automated processes more reliable and transparent.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：AI Coding 正在改写大厂工程师分工
items.summary_zh: AI编码工具正在深刻改变大厂工程师的分工模式，前后端界限逐渐模糊甚至消失。传统的前后端岗位被全栈加AI协作的新模式取代，工程师需要同时掌握提示工程、模型微调等新技能。这一趋势对从业者的职业规划和学习路径提出了挑战，也催生了新的“AI原生”开发岗位。
items.summary_en: AI coding tools are fundamentally reshaping the division of labor among engineers at major tech companies, blurring and even erasing the line between frontend and backend. Traditional roles are being replaced by a new model of full-stack plus AI collaboration, requiring engineers to learn prompt engineering and model fine-tuning. This trend challenges career planning and learning paths, while also creating new 'AI-native' development roles.

items.title: 有奖共建｜跑过数百万台服务器的AI运维系统开源了！提PR/报Bug/写体验，通通有奖
items.summary_zh: 一个已经在数百万台服务器上稳定运行的AI运维系统正式宣布开源，并同步启动了有奖共建活动。开发者可以通过提交Pull Request、报告Bug或者撰写使用体验来获取奖励。这个系统利用人工智能技术自动执行日常运维任务，大幅提升了运维效率，降低了人工干预的成本。对于运维工程师、DevOps团队以及所有对AIOps感兴趣的人来说，这既是一个学习先进技术的好机会，也是一个通过贡献获得回报的难得平台。
items.summary_en: An AI-powered operations system that has been running reliably on millions of servers is now open-sourced, along with a reward program for community contributions. Developers can earn prizes by submitting pull requests, reporting bugs, or sharing their usage experiences. The system leverages AI to automate routine operational tasks, significantly boosting efficiency and reducing the cost of manual intervention. For ops engineers, DevOps teams, and anyone interested in AIOps, this presents both a great opportunity to learn advanced technology and a rare platform to gain rewards through contributions.

items.title: Argo CD 3.5 推出内部双向 TLS 与源码完整性校验支持，强化软件供应链安全
items.summary_zh: Argo CD 3.5版本正式发布，新增内部双向TLS和源码完整性校验功能。内部双向TLS确保了集群组件之间通信的加密和身份验证，源码完整性校验则能防止代码被篡改，这两项特性极大增强了软件供应链的安全性，尤其适合对安全要求严苛的企业级GitOps部署场景。
items.summary_en: Argo CD 3.5 has been released with two major security enhancements: internal mutual TLS and source code integrity verification. Internal mTLS ensures encrypted and authenticated communication between cluster components, while source code integrity checks prevent tampering. These features significantly strengthen the software supply chain, making Argo CD an even more secure choice for enterprise GitOps deployments with strict security requirements.

items.title: Anthropic 突发 Sonnet 5，但大家更期待 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 明天解禁
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 突然发布了 Sonnet 5 模型，但社区更期待明天即将解禁的 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5。这种错峰发布策略暗示 Anthropic 正在构建不同能力梯度的模型家族，以覆盖从轻量对话到复杂推理的多样场景。开发者们早已开始预热，纷纷猜测新模型在代码生成和长上下文处理上的突破，这将进一步点燃 AI 应用创新的竞争。
items.summary_en: Anthropic unexpectedly released Sonnet 5, while the community eagerly awaits tomorrow's unlock of Fable 5 and Mythos 5. This staggered launch strategy suggests Anthropic is building a model family with varying capability gradients to cover use cases from lightweight chat to complex reasoning. Developers are already speculating about breakthroughs in code generation and long-context handling, which will further intensify competition in AI application innovation.

items.title: 从 QCon 到 AICon：参加 InfoQ 技术大会的第五年
聚力 AI 硬件创新｜2026 首届 openvela AI 硬件开发者大赛火热报名中
items.summary_zh: 2026 年首届 openvela AI 硬件开发者大赛已开放报名，聚焦 AI 硬件创新，涵盖从边缘计算到可穿戴设备的各类方案。大赛提供技术支持与产业资源，旨在加速原型落地并连接开发者与市场需求。对于希望将自己的智能硬件创意转化为实际产品的开发者、创业者来说，这是不可多得的展示舞台和资源对接机会。
items.summary_en: The 2026 first openvela AI Hardware Developer Competition is now open for registration, focusing on AI hardware innovation spanning edge computing to wearables. The competition offers technical support and industry resources to accelerate prototyping and connect developers with market demands. For developers and entrepreneurs looking to turn their smart hardware ideas into real products, this is a rare platform for showcasing and resource matching.

items.title: Cloudflare 如何解决了 quiche 中的一个拥塞漏洞
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 披露了如何在 QUIC 协议实现 quiche 中发现并修复一个拥塞控制漏洞的详细过程。该漏洞可能导致恶意流量绕过拥塞检测，从而引发网络拥塞或服务降级。Cloudflare 通过严格的压力测试和验证流程确保了漏洞修补的完备性，对依赖 QUIC 协议的低延迟应用（如视频会议和实时游戏）有重要的稳定性保障意义。
items.summary_en: Cloudflare detailed how it discovered and fixed a congestion control vulnerability in its QUIC implementation quiche. The flaw could have allowed malicious traffic to bypass congestion detection, potentially causing network congestion or service degradation. Through rigorous stress testing and validation, Cloudflare ensured the fix was complete. This is significant for latency-sensitive applications relying on QUIC, such as video conferencing and real-time gaming, as it reinforces their stability.

items.title: 他用一条中文推文，点燃DeepSeek开源社区
Agent成为数据库新用户，AI数据库为什么必须走向湖库一体？
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI Agent 成为数据库的新型“用户”，传统数据仓库和单纯的数据湖已无法满足智能体对实时数据访问与多模态融合的需求。行业正推动“湖库一体”架构，将数据湖的灵活存储与数据库的强一致性结合，让 Agent 能像操作单一系统一样无缝调用数据。这对构建自主决策的 AI 应用至关重要，尤其适合智能客服、自动化运维等场景。
items.summary_en: As AI agents become new 'users' of databases, traditional data warehouses and simple data lakes can no longer meet agents' demands for real-time data access and multimodal fusion. The industry is moving toward a 'lakehouse' architecture that combines the flexible storage of data lakes with the strong consistency of databases, allowing agents to seamlessly access data as if operating a single system. This is critical for building autonomous decision-making AI applications, particularly for smart customer service and automated operations.

items.title: Slack 概述了构建多云 AI 服务平台的四阶段发展路径
items.summary_zh: Slack 详细阐述了构建多云 AI 服务平台的四阶段发展路径，从基础设施标准化到智能编排逐步演进。这套方法论旨在帮助企业摆脱单一云厂商绑定，同时通过统一 API 和弹性资源池提升 AI 模型的推理效率与可靠性。对正在规划多云架构的 AI 团队来说，这提供了一个可复用的参考框架，能显著降低跨云运维的复杂度。
items.summary_en: Slack outlined a four-phase roadmap for building a multi-cloud AI service platform, progressing from infrastructure standardization to intelligent orchestration. The approach aims to help enterprises avoid vendor lock-in while improving AI inference efficiency and reliability through unified APIs and elastic resource pools. For AI teams planning multi-cloud architectures, this provides a reusable reference framework that significantly reduces cross-cloud operational complexity.

items.title: Cloudflare 推出支持零信任部署和迁移的代理技能
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare推出了支持零信任架构部署与迁移的代理技能，帮助企业简化从传统VPN到零信任网络的转换过程。该特性通过统一代理层自动处理身份验证、设备健康检查和流量路由，显著降低了迁移风险和操作复杂度，特别适合那些正在升级安全策略但缺乏专门团队的组织。
items.summary_en: Cloudflare has introduced a new proxy skill that supports zero-trust architecture deployment and migration, simplifying the transition from traditional VPN to zero-trust networks. The feature uses a unified proxy layer to automatically handle authentication, device health checks, and traffic routing, significantly reducing migration risks and operational complexity. It is especially beneficial for organizations upgrading their security posture without a dedicated team.

items.title: 在企业内部构建欧洲云编排平台
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了如何在企业内部构建欧洲云编排平台，以应对严格的数据主权和合规要求。该平台整合了多云管理、自动化工作流以及本地化部署能力，特别适合在欧盟运营的跨国企业或对数据隐私高度敏感的组织，帮助他们高效管理混合云环境同时满足GDPR等法规。
items.summary_en: This article explores how to build a European cloud orchestration platform within enterprises to address strict data sovereignty and compliance requirements. The platform integrates multi-cloud management, automated workflows, and localized deployment, making it ideal for multinational companies operating in the EU or privacy-sensitive organizations. It helps efficiently manage hybrid cloud environments while meeting regulations like GDPR.

items.title: 8 人起家年入上亿美元，推出自研大模型对战 Cursor、Claude Code？
items.summary_zh: 一个仅有8人的初创团队，年收入突破一亿美元，并推出了自研的大模型直接对标Cursor和Claude Code。这支团队以极精简的人力实现了惊人的商业增长，他们的故事揭示了在AI代码辅助领域，小团队凭借垂直深耕和高效执行也能撼动巨头。对于创业者和技术投资人而言，这是一个关于如何用最少资源撬动最大价值的典型案例。
items.summary_en: A startup with only eight people has achieved an annual revenue exceeding one hundred million dollars and launched its own large language model to directly challenge Cursor and Claude Code. With a remarkably lean team, they have achieved stunning commercial growth, showing that in AI-assisted coding, small teams can disrupt giants through deep vertical focus and efficient execution. For entrepreneurs and tech investors, this is a classic case of leveraging minimal resources for maximum impact.

items.title: 网易有道CEO周枫：Harness即产品
items.summary_zh: 网易有道CEO周枫提出“Harness即产品”理念，强调AI能力必须整合为易用的产品化工具才能真正创造价值。这一观点反映了当前AI落地过程中从技术驱动到产品驱动的重要转变，对于教育科技、智能硬件等领域企业在设计AI产品时具有启发意义，即让AI“隐藏”在好用工具的背后。
items.summary_en: NetEase Youdao CEO Zhou Feng advocates the idea of 'Harness as Product,' stressing that AI capabilities must be integrated into user-friendly productized tools to create real value. This perspective highlights a crucial shift from technology-driven to product-driven AI implementation, offering valuable lessons for companies in edtech and smart hardware: let AI work behind the scenes of seamless tools.
